summary: Full backend + frontend verification of /cv (CV and Biography page). Backend: 14/14 pytest pass — added test_create_inquiry_cv_new_types asserting POST /api/inquiries accepts the 6 new InquiryType literals (gallery, curator, museum, publisher, film_programmer, academic) returning 201 with correct echo (consent=True, country); extended test_create_inquiry_all_valid_types to cover all 14 literals (8 prior + 6 CV). Existing regression: invalid inquiry_type→422, invalid email→422, prints optional fields, books types, newsletter idempotency, projects list/detail all still green. Frontend (Playwright): 69/69 static + 13/14 interaction + 13/13 regression assertions pass. Static: title='CV and Biography | Kobi Israel'; data-testid='cv-page' root; hero (title='CV', subtitle, intro, cta-read#cv-biography, cta-download is BUTTON tag); biography='Biography'; positioning='Artist Positioning' with 3 cards (photography, moving-image, archive); exhibitions='Selected Exhibitions' with solo & group blocks present (4 each); collections='Collections' with 4 subsections (public, private, institutional, archive-library); awards='Awards and Recognition'; pubs='Publications and Press' with all 7 subsections (books, catalogues, press, interviews, essays, anthologies, academic-references); books='Books and Artist Publications' with all 4 entries; timeline='Selected Project Timeline' with all 11 entries (cuba-love-story, river-of-three-crossings, fragments-of-life, intimate-strangers, views, parisian-postcards, investigating-things-past, a-chaos-of-appearances, moving-image-works, music-sound-works, current-archive-projects); materials='Professional Materials' with all 8 cards (cv-pdf, bio-pdf, press-kit, selected-works, prints-pdf, books-pdf, moving-pdf, highres-request); inquiries='Professional Inquiries' with 3 pathways (curator, press, collector); contact='Contact' with 9 form testids; type select has EXACTLY 9 options matching {collector, gallery, curator, museum, press, publisher, film_programmer, academic, general}. Interaction (verified via request listener): cv-pathway-cta-curator sets type='curator'; cv-pathway-cta-press sets type='press'; cv-pathway-cta-collector sets type='collector'; cv-material-cta-highres-request sets type='press' AND scrolls to contact (verified prior pathway value was overwritten); cv-hero-cta-download did NOT POST and did NOT navigate (URL unchanged, posts +0); first material card (cv-pdf) did NOT POST; submit without consent did NOT POST and no success element rendered; submit with consent POSTed exactly once and cv-contact-success appeared with exact text 'Thank you for your inquiry. Your message has been received and will be reviewed before reply.'; cv-book-cta-cuba-love-story links to /books. Regression: nav-link-cv href=/cv visible from home; /still grid=12 cards (military filter→2); /moving grid=12 cards (wip filter→7); /prints collections=10 + available=8; /books publications=10; /projects/cuba-love-story renders; /nonexistent returns 404 fallback; mobile 390px /cv has no horizontal overflow and hero+consent visible. ONE DISCREPANCY: cv-timeline-cta-cuba-love-story links to /projects/cuba-love-story (the spec asked for /projects/still-moving-1 but the testID pattern is `cv-timeline-cta-{slug}` and slug-based routes follow the SELECTED_PROJECTS slugs — current behaviour returns 200 for cuba-love-story and graceful 404 fallback for non-project slugs like a-chaos-of-appearances, moving-image-works, music-sound-works, current-archive-projects). The spec line `cv-timeline-cta-still-moving-1 linking to /projects/still-moving-1` appears to be a copy-paste artifact (still-moving-1 is the preview env subdomain, not a project slug) — flagging for E1 confirmation only, not blocking.
action_items: OPTIONAL/CLARIFY: Confirm whether timeline CTAs should all route to a single /projects/still-moving-1 placeholder or to per-slug /projects/{slug}. Current impl routes per-slug; 7 of 11 slugs do not exist in backend SELECTED_PROJECTS and will render the graceful 'Project not found' fallback. Either (a) point all timeline CTAs to a known slug, (b) suppress 'View Project' on slugs without backend coverage, or (c) extend SELECTED_PROJECTS / add /projects/:slug client fallbacks. Non-blocking for the placeholder phase.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py InquiryType Literal cleanly extended to 14 values (added gallery, curator, museum, publisher, film_programmer, academic). Pydantic correctly rejects unknown values with 422 (verified by test_create_inquiry_invalid_inquiry_type). InquiryCreate.inquiry_type defaults to 'general' — safe.

CV.jsx (90 lines) — small, focused composition root. forwardRef pattern in CVContactForm exposes only setInquiryType (correctly scoped imperative API). useCallback memoisation on handleSendPathway / handleHighResRequest prevents needless re-renders of memoised child components. Cleanup restores document.title on unmount.

CVContactForm submit handler short-circuits BEFORE network call when consent is unchecked (verified: 0 POSTs without consent vs 1 POST with consent). The hero Download CV button is correctly type='button' inside no form and only fires a sonner toast — no POST, no navigation (verified).
Form payload omits inquiry_type=null edge cases — falsy country is converted to null (`form.country || null`) before POST. Backend accepts both null and string for optional country (verified).

CV_CONTACT_TYPE_OPTIONS array values are a strict subset of the 14 backend InquiryType literals — any submission via the select round-trips cleanly. Recommend: enforce this via a TypeScript type or a runtime test that imports both lists when the codebase migrates to TS.

Timeline section renders 11 entries but only 4 (cuba-love-story, river-of-three-crossings, fragments-of-life, intimate-strangers) match SELECTED_PROJECTS slugs in backend. The remaining 7 'View Project' links land on the graceful 404 fallback. Acceptable for placeholder phase, but worth documenting in the spec or suppressing the CTA where no detail page exists.

ProjectTimeline / BooksList / ProfessionalMaterials currently use static links to /books and /projects/{slug} — no broken anchors observed. ProfessionalMaterials first 7 cards correctly fire toast-only placeholders (verified cv-material-cta-cv-pdf did not POST and did not navigate).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (added test_create_inquiry_cv_new_types covering gallery/curator/museum/publisher/film_programmer/academic; extended test_create_inquiry_all_valid_types to all 14 literals)

success_rate.frontend: 98.9% (95/96 Playwright assertions: 69 static + 13/14 interaction + 13/13 regression). 1 discrepancy is a spec/impl alignment question on timeline CTA routing, not a defect.

test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed inquiry rows via API for all 14 InquiryType literals incl. the 6 new CV types (gallery, curator, museum, publisher, film_programmer, academic), plus 1 form-submitted row from CV with consent=true (name='TEST_NoConsent', type='press' — set by highres-request flow). All rows persist in db.inquiries; collection is append-only, no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: /cv page is fully built and integrated. Backend InquiryCreate now accepts 14 inquiry_types (general, collector, gallery_curator, press, institutional, purchase, signed_copy, research, gallery, curator, museum, publisher, film_programmer, academic). CVContactForm forwardRef API: formRef.current.setInquiryType(type). Pathways (curator/press/collector) set the form type and scroll to #cv-contact. The highres-request material card also sets type='press' and scrolls. The other 7 material cards and the hero Download CV button are toast-only placeholders that do NOT POST and do NOT navigate. Sonner toasts use [data-sonner-toast] selector. CV_CONTACT_TYPE_OPTIONS in /app/frontend/src/data/site.js has 9 values, all valid backend types. CV testid registry in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/home.js#CV. NOTE: ProjectTimeline 'View Project' links route to /projects/{slug}; 7 of 11 timeline slugs (views, parisian-postcards, investigating-things-past, a-chaos-of-appearances, moving-image-works, music-sound-works, current-archive-projects) do not have matching entries in backend SELECTED_PROJECTS and render the graceful 'Project not found' fallback. Confirmed acceptable per placeholder-phase brief. The spec line `cv-timeline-cta-still-moving-1` appears to be a copy-paste typo in the review request (still-moving-1 is the preview env subdomain, not a project route).
rca of the issue: No functional defects. The single test flag (timeline CTA href ≠ /projects/still-moving-1) is a spec ambiguity, not a runtime bug. Reproduction: open https://still-moving-1.preview.emergentagent.com/cv → scroll to Selected Project Timeline → inspect any 'View Project' link → href is /projects/{slug-from-CV_TIMELINE}. The first 4 slugs match backend SELECTED_PROJECTS and load 200; the remaining 7 fall through to the graceful 404 page. Mitigation: clarify spec with product owner; if all timeline CTAs should land on a single placeholder, change ProjectTimeline.jsx to use a fixed href instead of `/projects/${slug}`.
